title: EnergyResourceStorage
description: Typed schema for storage DER energy resources (BESS, EV charger, V2G). CIM: BESS/BATTERY → cim:BatteryUnit, EV_CHARGER/EV_V2G → cim:ElectricVehicleChargingStation (IEC 61970-302). BATTERY is a deprecated alias for BESS. EV_V2G denotes a bidirectional vehicle-to-grid capable charger. storageCapacityKwh is exclusive to this kind (replaces energyCapacityKwh from EnergyResource v1.1).

type.description: Asset-class discriminator. BATTERY is deprecated; use BESS. EV_V2G is bidirectional V2G capable. CIM: BESS/BATTERY → BatteryUnit, EV_CHARGER/EV_V2G → ElectricVehicleChargingStation (IEC 61970-302).

subResources.description: Child resources (e.g. battery modules, charger ports). Each item is a bare id string or an inline EnergyResource object.

parentResources.description: ids of parent resources (e.g. the meter this DER sits behind).

EnergyResourceStorageAttributes.description: Attributes for storage DER resources. Includes common fields (make, model, ratedPowerKw, telemetryProvider, commissioningDate, gps) plus storage-specific fields (storageCapacityKwh, storageType, stateOfHealthPct, maxChargeRateKw, maxDischargeRateKw).

ratedPowerKw.description: Manufacturer-rated peak power, kW. CIM: GeneratingUnit.maxOperatingP.

telemetryProvider.description: Vendor API / data source identifier for telemetry.

commissioningDate.description: ISO 8601 date when this storage asset was commissioned.

storageCapacityKwh.description: Rated stored-energy capacity, kWh. CIM: BatteryUnit.ratedE. Exclusive to EnergyResourceStorage — replaces energyCapacityKwh from EnergyResource v1.1.
